mapper.select: SELECT * FROM USER_ACCOUNT WHERE ROLE = 1 AND NAME LIKE '%'||#{name}||'%' ORDER BY NO ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_ACCOUNT (NO, ID, PWD, PHONE, REG_DATE, ROLE, NAME) VALUES (SEQ_USER_ACCOUNT_NO.NEXTVAL, #{id}, #{pwd}, #{phone}, SYSDATE, 1, #{name})
mapper.update: UPDATE USER_ACCOUNT SET ID=#{id}, PWD=#{pwd}, PHONE=#{phone}, NAME=#{name} WHERE NO=#{no}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM USER_ACCOUNT WHERE ROLE = 2 AND NAME LIKE '%'||#{id}||'%' ORDER BY NO ASC
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM USER_ACCOUNT WHERE NO IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT E.NO, E.PUBLIC_DATA_EVENT_NO, E.USER_ACCOUNT_NO, E.PRICE, E.RATING, UA.NAME AS USER_NAME, PDE.NAME AS EVENT_NAME, PDE.PLACE, PDE.START_DATE, PDE.END_DATE, PDE.CONTENT, PDE.TEL, PDE.HOMEPAGE FROM EVENT E LEFT JOIN ADMIN.USER_ACCOUNT UA ON E.USER_ACCOUNT_NO = UA.NO LEFT JOIN ADMIN.PUBLIC_DATA_EVENT PDE ON E.PUBLIC_DATA_EVENT_NO = PDE.NO WHERE PDE.NAME LIKE '%'||#{eventName}||'%' ORDER BY E.NO ASC
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM EVENT WHERE NO IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT ER.NO, ER.CONTENT, ER.SUB_DATE, ER.EVENT_NO, ER.USER_ACCOUNT_NO, ER.RATING, UA.NAME AS USER_NAME, PDE.NAME AS EVENT_NAME FROM EVENT_REVIEW ER LEFT JOIN USER_ACCOUNT UA ON ER.USER_ACCOUNT_NO = UA.NO LEFT JOIN EVENT E ON ER.EVENT_NO = E.NO LEFT JOIN PUBLIC_DATA_EVENT PDE ON E.PUBLIC_DATA_EVENT_NO = PDE.NO WHERE PDE.NAME LIKE '%'||#{eventName}||'%' ORDER BY ER.NO ASC
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM EVENT_REVIEW WHERE NO IN
#{id}
